conflicts.label: Iran 2026 (Day 43)
conflicts.note: Operation Epic Fury — Day 43. ISLAMABAD TALKS BEGIN: First direct US-Iran face-to-face since 1979 — VP Vance, Witkoff, Kushner meet Ghalibaf and Araghchi. Ceasefire holds on Iran (~96 hours) but Lebanon excluded — 1,953+ Lebanese killed. March CPI: 3.3% YoY, gas +21.2% MoM (largest since 1967). Consumer sentiment all-time low (47.6). Hormuz still closed — 'Tehran Tollbooth' charging $2M/vessel. S&P best week since Nov (+3.6%). Pope Leo XIV peace vigil at St. Peter's. Dated Brent $132 vs futures $97 — market prices ceasefire as temporary. ~$50.1B spent.

conflicts.label: Iraq 2003 (Day 21)
conflicts.note: Operation Iraqi Freedom — "shock and awe" + ground invasion. 300,000 troops deployed.

conflicts.label: Libya 2011 (Day 21)
conflicts.note: Operation Odyssey Dawn / Unified Protector — NATO no-fly zone. Limited US role.

conflicts.label: Gulf 1991 (Day 21)
conflicts.note: Operation Desert Storm — 38-day air campaign + 100-hour ground war. 700,000 coalition troops.

sources: CRS Reports R44116 (Iraq), RL33110 (Gulf War), R41725 (Libya). Costs inflation-adjusted to 2026 dollars using BLS CPI-U.
